system.description: Not only must the target die, the target must not know how death came. If by some misfortune the ghost of the victim is interrogated, it must not have any special knowledge. There is a ritual and an amulet for the assassins to ensure secrecy. No one living or dead can know who did this deed.
system.additional_info: By the time the crew knows the job, there is a better than even chance their knowledge is too much risk and their employer plans to kill them. They might want some leverage.
